name: Match Bee
author: Poki
description: Match Bee is a challenging match-3 puzzle game. As a hard-working bee, your task is to match flowers and gather enough honey from the honeycomb within the time limit. Connect 3 or more of the same flowers horizontally or diagonally. The more flowers you match, the higher your score! Keep an eye on the time. You will fail to pass the level if you do not gather sufficient honey pods in time. The faster you complete the task, the more stars you earn! If you find yourself stuck, you can always use the special bees to help you. How quickly can you collect all the honey? How to play Match Bee? Click to swap tiles and match three in a row! Who created Match Bee? Match Bee is created by Adgard. Play their other games on Poki: Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , Merge to Million , Mahjoctopus , and One Hundred Castles Solitaire , Freecell Solitaire ! How can I play Match Bee for free? You can play Match Bee for free on Poki. Can I play Match Bee on mobile devices and desktop? Match Bee can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
